site: Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen
title: Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen
content:
### Together We Go Further
The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen is dedicated to providing comprehensive, reliable legal representation to our clients throughout Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties. We take great pride in being available to our clients whenever they need us, ensuring they always have a trusted attorney to talk to whenever they are faced with legal challenges or have a question.
At The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, our clients are our priority. As a result, we continue to evolve to be a technology-driven law firm, one that provides access to us in all ways. We also streamline the process of working with our team, which makes it easier and faster for our clients to continue to receive the very best support.
With several legal departments with extensive knowledge and experience in areas like personal injury, family immigration, business law, family law, workers’ compensation, and estate planning, our full-service law firm is here to support you. We speak Vietnamese, Spanish, Mandarin, Cantonese, and Japanese and offer free consultations.
You need a law firm that’s dedicated to the best possible service they can provide to help you navigate your legal matter and protect your rights. You can depend on The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen to be there for you in every way. We encourage you to contact us today to learn more about what we can do for you. Set up a consultation with our attorneys in Los Angeles now.
At Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we care about our clients and the struggles they are facing. When life needs to change, we work closely with our clients to navigate the legal options available to them, working to minimize their risk of making decisions without having all of the insight into the legal options available to them.
At The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we take pride in offering our clients exceptional legal service when they are faced with a crime. If you believe you are being charged or accused of a crime, it is your right to have an experienced, trusted attorney by your side.
Under California law, individuals have the legal right to pursue compensation for losses they suffer due to the negligence of another person or business. At the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen, we work to support our clients as they pursue that compensation in often difficult situations.
Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen provides tax legal support in California. Our team of highly experienced attorneys recognizes the complexity of California and U.S. federal tax on all levels.
Immigration legal matters are a very complicated matter, especially in California. If you are looking for help in managing a wide range of immigration legal matters, you need a highly experienced attorney by your side.
Our civil litigation attorneys at the Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen are committed to pursuing the best possible outcome for our clients. As civil litigators, we work to manage the legal matters that are most important to your life.
Estate planning is the process of creating very specific, legally binding directives for what should happen to your assets after your death. Under California law, if you do not make such decisions now while you are alive, the court will make them for you.
"I started working with them on my prenuptial agreement, later immigration application.
Excellent communication at all time, but also have my green card approved and received in very short time.
Highly recommend, people in this firm are relatively young but very experienced.  They all passionate on their jobs and I am very satisfied with results as well!"
"I'd like to recommend the Immigration services provided by this law firm; they are professional and paying attention in detail that sometimes annoyed me, but it helped the transparency of my case. I received my Green Card in 8 months without interviews. This cannot achieve without the Team support in preparing my files. Great Team."
"The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen assisted me immediately with their extensive knowledge of navigating through the entangled web some might know as the judicial system.. Time was of the essence with my case and the firm quickly assembled a team which adapted to a very culturally sensitive situation and produced positive results. I will definitely be coming back to them in the future for their tax and family planning services."
"I can't say enough good things about Adam Nguyen!  He takes the time to explain everything and was always available to answer my questions.  I highly recommend him as a lawyer and would definitely use him again."

### Welcome to our new website!
